summary: The elderly woman requires aggressive cancer care due to localized but sizable SCC; thus, she should undergo extensive removal via wide local excision combined possibly with preoperative or post-operative radio-chemo therapies as per current standards aiming both locally effective eradication while also addressing potential occult micro-mets through multi-modality approach despite not being considered 'radical'. This ensures comprehensive elimination without compromising quality-of-life too much given her frailty from advancing years making overly invasive procedures less favorable unless absolutely necessary based upon further staging workup findings indicating higher risk features warranting such measures immediately after initial debulking procedure if present clinically significant nodal involvement detected during evaluation phase prior initiating any planned treatments regimen tailored specifically against individual circumstances including comorbidity profile among others influencing final decision-making process regarding optimal sequence & timing across all involved disciplines contributing toward holistic plan designed exclusively around each unique set of factors characterizing specific instance under review here today within context posed originally about managing newly diagnosed vulval SC offense amongst geriatric population presenting otherwise fit enough candidates amenable multiple therapeutic interventions simultaneously when indicated judiciously weighing risks vs benefits carefully throughout entire continuum spanning diagnosis till follow-up phases inclusive thereof. Agent2 concludes recommending an intensive combination involving upfront surgical debridement supplemented where appropriate laterally either before starting concurrent chemo-radiotherapeutic regimens intended primarily palliative nature albeit still striving achieve complete remission whenever feasible especially since there is considerable chance persistent/recurrent lesions may develop subsequently regardless how meticulously one operates leaving nothing behind whatsoever hence justifying continued surveillance monitoring serial imaging studies periodically thereafter until full recovery achieved conclusively confirmed free malignant cells presence entirely thereby assuring peace mind knowing every effort made properly accounted fully addressed comprehensively covering whole
